title: The Cloud That Won't Quite Break

mood.label: Uneasy 🌥️
mood.summary: A day that nudges up to 40 and tips into the bottom of the mixed band: a second wave of US strikes on Iran, a Russian missile that woke Kyiv near 1 a.m., famine in Sudan, Ebola in the Congo and a still-rising Gaza toll — set against record markets, the first medical X-ray in orbit and a World Cup final on the way, so it holds a hair below the middle without falling.

style.genre: warm afro-house-lite / neo-soul — a sampled Rhodes-ish electric piano laying a Bb mixolydian I–bVII–IV–vi comp over a steady four-on-the-floor RolandTR909 kit with an offbeat clap and a shaker, a sampled marimba tracing a circling topline in the gaps, sparse glockenspiel glints for the day's bright threads, a plucked acoustic bass walking the roots under a soft sine sub; mixolydian's lowered seventh (natural Ab over the Bb root) keeping the warmth honest and just-off-level — record markets and good science lifting one column while the war holds the other down, neither rising nor sinking

pattern:
stack(
  s("bd*4").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.74).room(0.14),
  s("~ cp ~ cp").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.4).room(0.22).delay(0.14).delaytime(0.19),
  s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.26).pan(sine.range(0.36,0.64).slow(7)),
  s("~ ~ sh ~ ~ ~ sh ~ ~ ~ sh ~ ~ sh ~ ~").bank("RhythmAce").gain(0.28).pan(0.6),
  note("<[bf2,d3,f3] [af2,c3,ef3] [ef3,g3,bf3] [g2,bf2,d3]>").s("gm_epiano2").attack(0.02).release(0.6).gain(0.5).room(0.4).rsize(3).lpf(sine.range(1300,2700).slow(12)),
  note("f4 ~ g4 bf4 ~ af4 ~ ef4 ~ g4 ~ bf4 c5 ~ ~ ~").s("marimba").gain(0.44).room(0.32).delay(0.24).delaytime(0.27).pan(0.44).lpf(3200),
  note("~ ~ ~ ~ bf5 ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ef6 ~ ~ ~ ~ ~").s("glockenspiel").gain(0.22).room(0.5).delay(0.2).delaytime(0.33),
  note("bf1 bf2 af1 af2 ef2 ef2 g1 g2").s("gm_acoustic_bass").gain(0.5).lpf(700).attack(0.01).release(0.24),
  note("<bf1 af1 ef1 g1>").s("sine").gain(0.3).lpf(190).attack(0.05).release(0.9)
)
sampleSources: Strudel default library (GM Rhodes electric piano & acoustic bass, VCSL marimba/glockenspiel, RolandTR909 & RhythmAce drum machines)

lines: A second wave broke over Tehran, and the strait went dark again
A missile woke the whole of Kyiv near one, fires in the rain
Fifty-nine thousand names in Sudan, a fever loose in the Congo hills
And Gaza counts a thousand more, nine months past a deal that stills
So it's forty on the meter, a cloud that won't quite break
The market's at its highest, and a country's still awake
Two columns filling opposite, the light against the weight
We tip a hair below the middle — uneasy, holding straight
Prices fell for the first time since the year we all stayed home
The S&P touched seventy-five hundred, Apple standing on its own
First X-ray taken up in orbit, forty years past the guess
And Jersey's got a final Sunday — Messi threading through the mess
